title: Team News | Wanderers v Stockport County | Bolton Wanderers FC
text: Bolton Wanderers team news ahead of Stockport County clash. Bolton lineup: Bonham, Forino, Sheehan, Kenny, Dalby, Osei-Tutu, Apter, Toal, Cissoko, Dempsey, Conway. Substitutes: Harrington, Gale, Cozier-Duberry, Temple, Rodrigues, Christie, Burstow. Stockport County lineup: Addai, Dacres-Cogley, Bate, Olowu, Diamond, Pye, Wootton, Osborn, Norwood, Bailey, Sidibeh. Widemen Rob Apter and Ibrahim Cissoko both start, along with the returning Kyle Dempsey and Chris Forino, who impressed off the bench in the 2-1 success at Argyle which secured a first win in four games. Bolton are without McAtee after his red card on Friday, while midfielders Ethan Erhahon and Xavier Simons were absent through injury and are expected to miss Monday's game as a result.
